name: Sun

passive.name: Swift Exchange
passive.description: Sun hurls his (Golden Staff) in the target direction, dealing 200( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. He conjures a Doppelganger at his location that lasts 5s and inherits 40% of his attributes (and a portion of Attack Effects), conceals himself, and moves with the (Golden Staff). Sun reappears and retrieves the (Golden Staff) when it hits an enemy hero or reaches the maximum range.

skill1.name: Endless Variety
skill1.description: Sun hurls his (Golden Staff) in the target direction, dealing 200( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to enemies in its path. Upon hitting an enemy hero or Creep, or reaching the maximum range, the (Golden Staff) morphs into a Doppelganger that lasts 5s and inherits 40% of Sun's attributes (and a portion of his Attack Effects). (Endless Variety) and (Swift Exchange) are learned and upgraded together and share the same cooldown.

skill2.name: Instantaneous Move
skill2.description: Sun commands his Doppelgangers to strike at the target enemy with him, dealing 170( +40% Total Physical Attack) (Physical Damage) to the target and enemies behind them. This counts as Basic Attack damage and can trigger Attack Effects but cannot Crit.

ultimate.name: Simian God
ultimate.description: Enemies hit by Sun and his Doppelgangers will have their Physical Defense reduced by 4% (stacks up to 10 times). Sun recovers HP equal to 50% of the Doppelganger's Physical Attack each time a Doppelganger deals damage.

matchupSystem.strongAgainstReason: Sun can deal great sustained damage and has armor-busting capabilities, making him a good counter to tanks with low damage output, such as Franco and Gatotkaca.
matchupSystem.weakAgainstReason: Fighter heroes with Lifesteal can counter Sun, however. For example, heroes like Ruby can steal a lot of HP by hitting Sun and his Dopplegangers.
matchupSystem.synergyReason: Pair Sun with tanks who have strong CC abilities such as Belerick or Tigreal to create opportunities for Sun to deal damage.

mechanicNote: Sun adalah fighter dengan kombinasi sustain dan damage yang cocok untuk duel dan splitpush.

powerCurve.description: Early lane is manageable but he lacks immediate burst and his clone pressure is easier to clear/punish before items. After core on-hit/attack-speed items, his Doppelgangers multiply sustained DPS, shred defenses via passive stacks, and his split-push and Lord-fight damage become dominant late game.

combos.name: LANING
combos.description: Use Sun's 1st Skill to chip away at enemies, and close the distance once they're low on HP with his 2nd Skill. Then use his 3rd Skill to deal a burst of damage with his Dopplegangers. Sun can start with his Ultimate to summon a Doppleganger, then Blink on the enemy with his 2nd Skill, and finally use his 3rd Skill and Basic Attacks finish them off.

combos.name: TEAMFIGHT
combos.description: In teamfights, Sun can start with his Ultimate to summon a Doppelganger, and approach the enemy with his 2nd Skill. Finally, he can use his 2nd Skill and Basic Attacks to deal damage.
